messages: Web UI: road parameters are explicit and consumer-ready
required_evidence: road params present check PASS for this consumer
road_source and available/missing corners are explicit
road_width_status is explicit or clearly marked as derived/missing
notes: Consumer-specific road contract is separate so failures can be addressed to the correct surface (Web UI vs Desktop Animator).
No consumer may invent missing road traces or silently borrow them from unrelated channels.
